description: Everyday sentences built on the most useful Tagalog verb roots. Each entry's focus field shows the root.

sentences.tagalog: Kumain ako ng almusal kaninang umaga.
sentences.english: I ate breakfast this morning.

sentences.tagalog: Kumakain kami ng hapunan tuwing alas-siyete.
sentences.english: We eat dinner at seven o'clock.

sentences.tagalog: Kakain ako ng mangga mamaya.
sentences.english: I will eat a mango later.

sentences.tagalog: Kain na tayo, gutom na ako.
sentences.english: Let's eat now, I am hungry.

sentences.tagalog: Uminom siya ng kape bago magtrabaho.
sentences.english: He/she drank coffee before working.

sentences.tagalog: Umiinom ako ng maraming tubig araw-araw.
sentences.english: I drink a lot of water every day.

sentences.tagalog: Iinom ka ba ng gatas mamayang gabi?
sentences.english: Will you drink milk tonight?

sentences.tagalog: Inumin mo ang gamot mo pagkatapos kumain.
sentences.english: Take your medicine after eating.

sentences.tagalog: Natulog ako nang maaga kagabi.
sentences.english: I slept early last night.

sentences.tagalog: Natutulog pa ang mga bata.
sentences.english: The children are still sleeping.

sentences.tagalog: Matutulog na ako, inaantok na ako.
sentences.english: I will sleep now, I am already sleepy.

sentences.tagalog: Matulog ka na, gabi na.
sentences.english: Go to sleep now, it is already late.

sentences.tagalog: Gumising ako nang alas-sais kaninang umaga.
sentences.english: I woke up at six o'clock this morning.

sentences.tagalog: Gumigising siya nang maaga tuwing Lunes.
sentences.english: He/she wakes up early every Monday.

sentences.tagalog: Gigising ako nang maaga bukas.
sentences.english: I will wake up early tomorrow.

sentences.tagalog: Gisingin mo ako bago mag-alas-otso.
sentences.english: Wake me up before eight o'clock.

sentences.tagalog: Naligo ako bago umalis ng bahay.
sentences.english: I took a bath before leaving the house.

sentences.tagalog: Naliligo siya tuwing umaga at gabi.
sentences.english: He/she bathes every morning and evening.

sentences.tagalog: Maliligo muna ako bago tayo umalis.
sentences.english: I will take a bath first before we leave.

sentences.tagalog: Maligo ka na, malapit na tayong umalis.
sentences.english: Take a bath now, we are leaving soon.

sentences.tagalog: Pumunta kami sa palengke kahapon.
sentences.english: We went to the market yesterday.

sentences.tagalog: Pumupunta siya sa simbahan tuwing Linggo.
sentences.english: He/she goes to church every Sunday.

sentences.tagalog: Pupunta ako sa bahay mo mamaya.
sentences.english: I will go to your house later.

sentences.tagalog: Puntahan natin ang lola mo sa probinsya.
sentences.english: Let's visit your grandmother in the province.

sentences.tagalog: Umuwi siya nang maaga galing sa trabaho.
sentences.english: He/she went home early from work.

sentences.tagalog: Umuuwi ako tuwing alas-singko ng hapon.
sentences.english: I go home at five in the afternoon.

sentences.tagalog: Uuwi kami sa probinsya sa Pasko.
sentences.english: We will go home to the province at Christmas.

sentences.tagalog: Umuwi ka na bago dumilim.
sentences.english: Go home before it gets dark.

sentences.tagalog: Umalis na ang bus nang dumating kami.
sentences.english: The bus had already left when we arrived.

sentences.tagalog: Umaalis siya ng bahay nang alas-siyete.
sentences.english: He/she leaves the house at seven o'clock.

sentences.tagalog: Aalis kami bukas ng umaga.
sentences.english: We will leave tomorrow morning.

sentences.tagalog: Huwag kang umalis nang hindi nagpapaalam.
sentences.english: Do not leave without saying goodbye.

sentences.tagalog: Dumating ang bisita bago mag-tanghali.
sentences.english: The visitor arrived before noon.

sentences.tagalog: Dumarating ang sulat tuwing umaga.
sentences.english: The mail arrives every morning.

sentences.tagalog: Darating ang nanay ko bukas.
sentences.english: My mother will arrive tomorrow.

sentences.tagalog: Anong oras ka dumating kagabi?
sentences.english: What time did you arrive last night?

sentences.tagalog: Naglakad kami papunta sa paaralan.
sentences.english: We walked to school.

sentences.tagalog: Naglalakad siya tuwing umaga para sa kalusugan.
sentences.english: He/she walks every morning for health.

sentences.tagalog: Maglalakad na lang tayo, malapit lang naman.
sentences.english: Let's just walk, it is close anyway.

sentences.tagalog: Dahan-dahan kang maglakad sa madulas na sahig.
sentences.english: Walk slowly on the slippery floor.

sentences.tagalog: Tumakbo ako papunta sa istasyon ng bus.
sentences.english: I ran to the bus station.

sentences.tagalog: Tumatakbo siya sa parke tuwing umaga.
sentences.english: He/she runs in the park every morning.

sentences.tagalog: Tatakbo kami sa marathon sa Linggo.
sentences.english: We will run in the marathon on Sunday.

sentences.tagalog: Huwag kang tumakbo sa loob ng bahay.
sentences.english: Do not run inside the house.

sentences.tagalog: Umupo kami sa harap ng entablado.
sentences.english: We sat in front of the stage.

sentences.tagalog: Umuupo siya lagi sa tabi ng bintana.
sentences.english: He/she always sits beside the window.

sentences.tagalog: Uupo na lang ako dito sa sulok.
sentences.english: I will just sit here in the corner.

sentences.tagalog: Umupo ka muna habang naghihintay.
sentences.english: Sit down first while waiting.

sentences.tagalog: Tumayo ang lahat nang dumating ang guro.
sentences.english: Everyone stood up when the teacher arrived.

sentences.tagalog: Tumatayo siya nang maaga para sa byahe.
sentences.english: He/she gets up early for the trip.

sentences.tagalog: Tatayo ako sa harap para makita ko nang mabuti.
sentences.english: I will stand in front so I can see well.

sentences.tagalog: Tumayo ka at mag-unat ng katawan.
sentences.english: Stand up and stretch your body.

sentences.tagalog: Bumili ako ng sariwang gulay sa palengke.
sentences.english: I bought fresh vegetables at the market.

sentences.tagalog: Bumibili kami ng tinapay tuwing umaga.
sentences.english: We buy bread every morning.

sentences.tagalog: Bibili ako ng regalo para sa kaarawan niya.
sentences.english: I will buy a gift for his/her birthday.

sentences.tagalog: Bilhin mo na ang gusto mo habang mura pa.
sentences.english: Buy what you want while it is still cheap.

sentences.tagalog: Nagbayad ako ng kuryente kahapon.
sentences.english: I paid the electricity bill yesterday.

sentences.tagalog: Nagbabayad kami ng renta tuwing unang araw ng buwan.
sentences.english: We pay the rent on the first day of the month.

sentences.tagalog: Magbabayad ako ng utang ko sa iyo bukas.
sentences.english: I will pay my debt to you tomorrow.

sentences.tagalog: Bayaran mo muna ang pamasahe.
sentences.english: Pay the fare first.

sentences.tagalog: Nagbigay siya ng pagkain sa mga kapitbahay.
sentences.english: He/she gave food to the neighbors.

sentences.tagalog: Nagbibigay ang lola ko ng payo lagi.
sentences.english: My grandmother always gives advice.

sentences.tagalog: Magbibigay kami ng regalo sa kanya.
sentences.english: We will give him/her a gift.

sentences.tagalog: Ibigay mo ito sa nanay mo.
sentences.english: Give this to your mother.

sentences.tagalog: Kumuha ako ng tubig sa kusina.
sentences.english: I got water from the kitchen.

sentences.tagalog: Kumukuha siya ng litrato ng mga bulaklak.
sentences.english: He/she takes pictures of the flowers.

sentences.tagalog: Kukuha ako ng tiket para sa atin.
sentences.english: I will get tickets for us.

sentences.tagalog: Kunin mo ang bag ko sa kwarto.
sentences.english: Get my bag from the room.

sentences.tagalog: Nagdala ako ng pagkain sa handaan.
sentences.english: I brought food to the party.

sentences.tagalog: Nagdadala siya ng payong araw-araw.
sentences.english: He/she carries an umbrella every day.

sentences.tagalog: Magdadala kami ng prutas bukas.
sentences.english: We will bring fruit tomorrow.

sentences.tagalog: Dalhin mo ang jacket mo, malamig sa labas.
sentences.english: Bring your jacket, it is cold outside.

sentences.tagalog: Nagluto ang tatay ko ng adobo kagabi.
sentences.english: My father cooked adobo last night.

sentences.tagalog: Nagluluto kami ng hapunan nang magkasama.
sentences.english: We cook dinner together.

sentences.tagalog: Magluluto ako ng sinigang bukas.
sentences.english: I will cook sinigang tomorrow.

sentences.tagalog: Lutuin mo ang kanin bago sila dumating.
sentences.english: Cook the rice before they arrive.

sentences.tagalog: Naghugas ako ng mga plato pagkatapos kumain.
sentences.english: I washed the dishes after eating.

sentences.tagalog: Naghuhugas siya ng kamay bago kumain.
sentences.english: He/she washes his/her hands before eating.

sentences.tagalog: Maghuhugas ako ng mga baso mamaya.
sentences.english: I will wash the glasses later.

sentences.tagalog: Hugasan mo ang mga prutas bago kainin.
sentences.english: Wash the fruits before eating them.

sentences.tagalog: Naglinis kami ng bahay noong Sabado.
sentences.english: We cleaned the house last Saturday.

sentences.tagalog: Naglilinis siya ng kwarto tuwing umaga.
sentences.english: He/she cleans the room every morning.

sentences.tagalog: Maglilinis ako ng kusina pagkatapos magluto.
sentences.english: I will clean the kitchen after cooking.

sentences.tagalog: Linisin mo ang mesa bago tayo kumain.
sentences.english: Clean the table before we eat.

sentences.tagalog: Naglaba ako ng mga damit kaninang umaga.
sentences.english: I washed clothes this morning.

sentences.tagalog: Naglalaba kami tuwing Sabado.
sentences.english: We do the laundry every Saturday.

sentences.tagalog: Maglalaba ako bukas kung maganda ang panahon.
sentences.english: I will do the laundry tomorrow if the weather is good.

sentences.tagalog: Labhan mo ang uniporme mo ngayong gabi.
sentences.english: Wash your uniform tonight.

sentences.tagalog: Sumulat ako ng liham sa kaibigan ko.
sentences.english: I wrote a letter to my friend.

sentences.tagalog: Sumusulat siya sa kanyang talaarawan gabi-gabi.
sentences.english: He/she writes in his/her diary every night.

sentences.tagalog: Susulat ako ng listahan bago mamalengke.
sentences.english: I will write a list before going to the market.

sentences.tagalog: Isulat mo ang pangalan mo dito.
sentences.english: Write your name here.

sentences.tagalog: Bumasa ako ng libro bago matulog.
sentences.english: I read a book before sleeping.

sentences.tagalog: Nagbabasa siya ng balita tuwing umaga.
sentences.english: He/she reads the news every morning.

sentences.tagalog: Babasahin ko ang sulat mo mamaya.
sentences.english: I will read your letter later.

sentences.tagalog: Basahin mo nang malakas ang kwento.
sentences.english: Read the story out loud.

sentences.tagalog: Nag-aral ako ng Tagalog kagabi.
sentences.english: I studied Tagalog last night.

sentences.tagalog: Nag-aaral siya sa unibersidad sa Maynila.
sentences.english: He/she studies at a university in Manila.

sentences.tagalog: Mag-aaral kami para sa pagsusulit bukas.
sentences.english: We will study for the exam tomorrow.

sentences.tagalog: Mag-aral ka nang mabuti para sa kinabukasan mo.
sentences.english: Study well for your future.

sentences.tagalog: Nagturo siya ng matematika sa paaralan.
sentences.english: He/she taught mathematics at the school.

sentences.tagalog: Nagtuturo ang ate ko ng Ingles.
sentences.english: My older sister teaches English.

sentences.tagalog: Magtuturo ako sa iyo ng Tagalog.
sentences.english: I will teach you Tagalog.

sentences.tagalog: Ituro mo sa akin kung paano magluto ng adobo.
sentences.english: Teach me how to cook adobo.

sentences.tagalog: Naglaro ang mga bata sa labas kahapon.
sentences.english: The children played outside yesterday.

sentences.tagalog: Naglalaro sila ng basketball tuwing hapon.
sentences.english: They play basketball every afternoon.

sentences.tagalog: Maglalaro kami sa parke sa Linggo.
sentences.english: We will play at the park on Sunday.

sentences.tagalog: Maglaro tayo pagkatapos ng klase.
sentences.english: Let's play after class.

sentences.tagalog: Kumanta siya sa kaarawan ng lola.
sentences.english: He/she sang at grandmother's birthday.

sentences.tagalog: Kumakanta ako habang naliligo.
sentences.english: I sing while taking a bath.

sentences.tagalog: Kakanta kami sa pista ng bayan.
sentences.english: We will sing at the town fiesta.

sentences.tagalog: Kantahan mo kami ng paborito mong awit.
sentences.english: Sing us your favorite song.

sentences.tagalog: Sumayaw kami sa kasal ng pinsan ko.
sentences.english: We danced at my cousin's wedding.

sentences.tagalog: Sumasayaw siya nang magaling.
sentences.english: He/she dances well.

sentences.tagalog: Sasayaw ang mga bata sa palatuntunan.
sentences.english: The children will dance at the program.

sentences.tagalog: Sumayaw ka naman kahit isang beses.
sentences.english: Come on, dance at least once.

sentences.tagalog: Tumawa kami sa kwento ng lolo.
sentences.english: We laughed at grandfather's story.

sentences.tagalog: Tumatawa siya lagi kahit maliit na bagay.
sentences.english: He/she always laughs even at small things.

sentences.tagalog: Tatawa ka talaga kapag napanood mo ito.
sentences.english: You will really laugh when you watch this.

sentences.tagalog: Huwag kang tumawa, seryoso ako.
sentences.english: Do not laugh, I am serious.

sentences.tagalog: Umiyak ang sanggol buong gabi.
sentences.english: The baby cried all night.

sentences.tagalog: Umiiyak siya kapag nanonood ng malungkot na pelikula.
sentences.english: He/she cries when watching a sad movie.

sentences.tagalog: Iiyak ako sa tuwa kapag nakapasa ako.
sentences.english: I will cry with joy if I pass.

sentences.tagalog: Huwag kang umiyak, ayos lang ang lahat.
sentences.english: Do not cry, everything is fine.

sentences.tagalog: Nag-usap kami ng matagal kagabi.
sentences.english: We talked for a long time last night.

sentences.tagalog: Nag-uusap sila tungkol sa biyahe.
sentences.english: They are talking about the trip.

sentences.tagalog: Mag-uusap tayo bukas tungkol dito.
sentences.english: We will talk about this tomorrow.

sentences.tagalog: Mag-usap muna tayo bago ka magdesisyon.
sentences.english: Let's talk first before you decide.

sentences.tagalog: Nagtanong ako sa guro tungkol sa aralin.
sentences.english: I asked the teacher about the lesson.

sentences.tagalog: Nagtatanong lagi ang anak ko tungkol sa lahat.
sentences.english: My child always asks about everything.

sentences.tagalog: Magtatanong ako kung saan ang istasyon.
sentences.english: I will ask where the station is.

sentences.tagalog: Itanong mo sa kanya kung pupunta siya.
sentences.english: Ask him/her if he/she is going.

sentences.tagalog: Sumagot siya nang mabilis sa tanong ko.
sentences.english: He/she answered my question quickly.

sentences.tagalog: Sumasagot ang mga estudyante sa klase.
sentences.english: The students answer in class.

sentences.tagalog: Sasagot ako kapag alam ko ang tamang sagot.
sentences.english: I will answer when I know the correct answer.

sentences.tagalog: Sagutin mo ang telepono, pakiusap.
sentences.english: Answer the phone, please.

sentences.tagalog: Tumawag ako sa nanay ko kanina.
sentences.english: I called my mother earlier.

sentences.tagalog: Tumatawag siya sa akin tuwing gabi.
sentences.english: He/she calls me every night.

sentences.tagalog: Tatawag ako sa iyo pagdating ko.
sentences.english: I will call you when I arrive.

sentences.tagalog: Tawagan mo ako kapag handa ka na.
sentences.english: Call me when you are ready.

sentences.tagalog: Sinabi niya sa akin ang totoo.
sentences.english: He/she told me the truth.

sentences.tagalog: Sinasabi ng lola ko na mag-ingat lagi.
sentences.english: My grandmother says to always be careful.

sentences.tagalog: Sasabihin ko sa iyo ang sikreto mamaya.
sentences.english: I will tell you the secret later.

sentences.tagalog: Sabihin mo sa kanila na darating tayo.
sentences.english: Tell them that we are coming.

sentences.tagalog: Nakinig kami sa radyo kagabi.
sentences.english: We listened to the radio last night.

sentences.tagalog: Nakikinig siya ng musika habang nagtatrabaho.
sentences.english: He/she listens to music while working.

sentences.tagalog: Makikinig ako sa payo mo.
sentences.english: I will listen to your advice.

sentences.tagalog: Makinig ka nang mabuti sa guro.
sentences.english: Listen carefully to the teacher.

sentences.tagalog: Tumingin ako sa labas ng bintana.
sentences.english: I looked outside the window.

sentences.tagalog: Tumitingin siya sa mapa habang nagbibiyahe.
sentences.english: He/she looks at the map while traveling.

sentences.tagalog: Titingin ako sa presyo bago bumili.
sentences.english: I will look at the price before buying.

sentences.tagalog: Tumingin ka sa kaliwa't kanan bago tumawid.
sentences.english: Look left and right before crossing.

sentences.tagalog: Naghanap kami ng murang hotel sa bayan.
sentences.english: We looked for a cheap hotel in town.

sentences.tagalog: Naghahanap siya ng bagong trabaho.
sentences.english: He/she is looking for a new job.

sentences.tagalog: Maghahanap ako ng regalo para sa iyo.
sentences.english: I will look for a gift for you.

sentences.tagalog: Hanapin mo ang susi sa loob ng bag.
sentences.english: Look for the key inside the bag.

sentences.tagalog: Tumulong ako sa paglilinis ng bahay.
sentences.english: I helped with cleaning the house.

sentences.tagalog: Tumutulong siya sa mga magulang niya.
sentences.english: He/she helps his/her parents.

sentences.tagalog: Tutulong kami sa paghahanda ng handaan.
sentences.english: We will help prepare the party.

sentences.tagalog: Tulungan mo akong buhatin ito.
sentences.english: Help me carry this.

sentences.tagalog: Naghintay ako ng isang oras sa istasyon.
sentences.english: I waited for an hour at the station.

sentences.tagalog: Naghihintay sila ng bus sa kanto.
sentences.english: They are waiting for the bus at the corner.

sentences.tagalog: Maghihintay ako sa iyo sa labas.
sentences.english: I will wait for you outside.

sentences.tagalog: Hintayin mo ako, malapit na ako.
sentences.english: Wait for me, I am almost there.

sentences.tagalog: Binuksan ko ang pinto para sa bisita.
sentences.english: I opened the door for the visitor.

sentences.tagalog: Nagbubukas ang tindahan nang alas-otso.
sentences.english: The store opens at eight o'clock.

sentences.tagalog: Bubuksan ko ang bintana, mainit dito.
sentences.english: I will open the window, it is hot in here.

sentences.tagalog: Buksan mo ang ilaw, madilim na.
sentences.english: Turn on the light, it is already dark.

sentences.tagalog: Isinara ko ang pinto bago matulog.
sentences.english: I closed the door before sleeping.

sentences.tagalog: Nagsasara ang palengke nang alas-sais.
sentences.english: The market closes at six o'clock.

sentences.tagalog: Isasara ko ang bintana kapag umulan.
sentences.english: I will close the window if it rains.

sentences.tagalog: Isara mo ang gate pagkatapos mong lumabas.
sentences.english: Close the gate after you go out.

sentences.tagalog: Gumawa ako ng listahan ng bibilhin.
sentences.english: I made a list of things to buy.

sentences.tagalog: Gumagawa siya ng mesa sa garahe.
sentences.english: He/she is making a table in the garage.

sentences.tagalog: Gagawa kami ng plano para sa biyahe.
sentences.english: We will make a plan for the trip.

sentences.tagalog: Gawin mo ang takdang-aralin mo bago maglaro.
sentences.english: Do your homework before playing.

sentences.tagalog: Nag-isip ako ng regalong ibibigay sa kanya.
sentences.english: I thought of a gift to give him/her.

sentences.tagalog: Nag-iisip siya bago sumagot.
sentences.english: He/she thinks before answering.

sentences.tagalog: Mag-iisip ako ng paraan para makatulong.
sentences.english: I will think of a way to help.

sentences.tagalog: Mag-isip ka muna bago ka magsalita.
sentences.english: Think first before you speak.

sentences.tagalog: Naalala ko ang kwento ng lolo ko.
sentences.english: I remembered my grandfather's story.

sentences.tagalog: Naaalala ko ang bayan namin tuwing umuulan.
sentences.english: I remember our hometown whenever it rains.

sentences.tagalog: Maaalala mo ako kapag narinig mo ang kantang ito.
sentences.english: You will remember me when you hear this song.

sentences.tagalog: Alalahanin mo ang sinabi ko sa iyo.
sentences.english: Remember what I told you.

sentences.tagalog: Sumakay kami ng dyip papuntang bayan.
sentences.english: We rode a jeepney to town.

sentences.tagalog: Sumasakay siya ng bus araw-araw.
sentences.english: He/she rides the bus every day.

sentences.tagalog: Sasakay ako ng tren bukas ng umaga.
sentences.english: I will ride the train tomorrow morning.

sentences.tagalog: Sumakay ka na, aalis na tayo.
sentences.english: Get on now, we are leaving.

sentences.tagalog: Bumaba kami ng bus sa tapat ng simbahan.
sentences.english: We got off the bus in front of the church.

sentences.tagalog: Bumababa siya sa parehong istasyon araw-araw.
sentences.english: He/she gets off at the same station every day.

sentences.tagalog: Bababa ako sa susunod na kanto.
sentences.english: I will get off at the next corner.

sentences.tagalog: Bumaba ka nang dahan-dahan sa hagdan.
sentences.english: Go down the stairs slowly.

sentences.tagalog: Umakyat kami ng bundok noong Sabado.
sentences.english: We climbed a mountain last Saturday.

sentences.tagalog: Umaakyat siya ng hagdan nang mabilis.
sentences.english: He/she climbs the stairs quickly.

sentences.tagalog: Aakyat ako sa itaas para kunin ang bag ko.
sentences.english: I will go upstairs to get my bag.

sentences.tagalog: Umakyat ka sa taas at tawagin mo ang kuya mo.
sentences.english: Go upstairs and call your older brother.

sentences.tagalog: Ngumiti siya nang makita niya ako.
sentences.english: He/she smiled when he/she saw me.

sentences.tagalog: Ngumingiti lagi ang tindera sa amin.
sentences.english: The vendor always smiles at us.

sentences.tagalog: Ngingiti ka rin kapag narinig mo ang balita.
sentences.english: You will also smile when you hear the news.

sentences.tagalog: Ngumiti ka para sa litrato.
sentences.english: Smile for the picture.

sentences.tagalog: Nagbukas siya ng maliit na tindahan sa kanto.
sentences.english: He/she opened a small store at the corner.

sentences.tagalog: Naglagay ako ng mga bulaklak sa mesa.
sentences.english: I placed flowers on the table.

sentences.tagalog: Naglalagay siya ng asukal sa kape niya.
sentences.english: He/she puts sugar in his/her coffee.

sentences.tagalog: Maglalagay kami ng bagong ilaw sa kusina.
sentences.english: We will put a new light in the kitchen.

sentences.tagalog: Ilagay mo ang mga pinggan sa lababo.
sentences.english: Put the dishes in the sink.

sentences.tagalog: Nanood kami ng sine kagabi.
sentences.english: We watched a movie last night.

sentences.tagalog: Nanonood siya ng balita tuwing gabi.
sentences.english: He/she watches the news every night.

sentences.tagalog: Manonood kami ng laro sa Linggo.
sentences.english: We will watch the game on Sunday.

sentences.tagalog: Manood tayo ng pelikula mamayang gabi.
sentences.english: Let's watch a movie tonight.

sentences.tagalog: Nagbalik siya sa bayan pagkatapos ng maraming taon.
sentences.english: He/she returned to town after many years.

sentences.tagalog: Bumabalik ang mga ibon tuwing tag-init.
sentences.english: The birds come back every summer.

sentences.tagalog: Babalik ako agad pagkatapos ng trabaho.
sentences.english: I will come back right after work.

sentences.tagalog: Ibalik mo ang libro sa aklatan bukas.
sentences.english: Return the book to the library tomorrow.

sentences.tagalog: Natuto akong magluto mula sa nanay ko.
sentences.english: I learned to cook from my mother.

sentences.tagalog: Natututo siya nang mabilis.
sentences.english: He/she learns quickly.

sentences.tagalog: Matututo ka rin kung magsasanay ka araw-araw.
sentences.english: You will also learn if you practice every day.

sentences.tagalog: Gusto kong matuto ng Tagalog.
sentences.english: I want to learn Tagalog.

sentences.tagalog: Nagtrabaho ako nang buong araw kahapon.
sentences.english: I worked the whole day yesterday.

sentences.tagalog: Nagtatrabaho siya sa ospital.
sentences.english: He/she works at the hospital.

sentences.tagalog: Magtatrabaho ako sa ibang bansa sa susunod na taon.
sentences.english: I will work abroad next year.

sentences.tagalog: Magtrabaho tayo nang mabuti ngayong araw.
sentences.english: Let's work well today.

sentences.tagalog: Nagpahinga kami pagkatapos ng mahabang biyahe.
sentences.english: We rested after the long trip.

sentences.tagalog: Nagpapahinga siya tuwing tanghali.
sentences.english: He/she rests every noon.

sentences.tagalog: Magpapahinga muna ako bago magpatuloy.
sentences.english: I will rest first before continuing.

sentences.tagalog: Magpahinga ka muna, mukhang pagod ka.
sentences.english: Rest for a while, you look tired.

sentences.tagalog: Lumangoy kami sa dagat noong bakasyon.
sentences.english: We swam in the sea during vacation.

sentences.tagalog: Lumalangoy siya tuwing Sabado ng umaga.
sentences.english: He/she swims every Saturday morning.

sentences.tagalog: Lalangoy tayo sa ilog bukas.
sentences.english: We will swim in the river tomorrow.

sentences.tagalog: Huwag kang lumangoy kapag malakas ang alon.
sentences.english: Do not swim when the waves are strong.

sentences.tagalog: Bumalik ang bisita para magpasalamat.
sentences.english: The visitor came back to say thanks.

sentences.tagalog: Nagbenta siya ng gulay sa palengke.
sentences.english: He/she sold vegetables at the market.

sentences.tagalog: Nagbebenta sila ng sariwang isda tuwing umaga.
sentences.english: They sell fresh fish every morning.

sentences.tagalog: Magbebenta kami ng lumang gamit sa Sabado.
sentences.english: We will sell old things on Saturday.

sentences.tagalog: Ibenta mo na ang lumang bisikleta mo.
sentences.english: Sell your old bicycle already.

sentences.tagalog: Humingi ako ng tulong sa kapitbahay.
sentences.english: I asked the neighbor for help.

sentences.tagalog: Humihingi siya ng payo sa mga magulang niya.
sentences.english: He/she asks his/her parents for advice.

sentences.tagalog: Hihingi ako ng paumanhin sa kanya.
sentences.english: I will apologize to him/her.

sentences.tagalog: Humingi ka ng resibo sa tindahan.
sentences.english: Ask for a receipt at the store.
